_meta.description: CivicNow MA — 2026 election data for Waltham, Quincy, and Needham.
_meta.dataNote: Verified against city/town clerk sources. Candidate lists are demo-representative; always confirm with your local clerk. Waltham and Quincy have no local elections in 2026 — next local cycle is November 2, 2027.

nextLocalElection.note: Next Waltham city election. Mayor, City Council (ward + at-large), and School Committee seats will be on the ballot. Candidates TBD.

locations.name: Waltham City Hall — City Clerk's Office
locations.hours: Mon–Fri 8:30 AM–4:30 PM; Sat Aug 29 9 AM–1 PM

online.note: Register via Massachusetts Online Voter Registration.

inPerson.location: Waltham City Hall, City Clerk's Office, 610 Main Street
inPerson.note: In-person deadline at City Clerk's office.

sameDayRegistration.note: Massachusetts allows same-day voter registration at your polling place on Election Day.

officesOnBallot.note: Primary determines Democratic and Republican nominees for November.

locations.name: Needham Town Hall — Select Board Meeting Room
locations.hours: Mon–Fri 8:30 AM–5:00 PM; Sat Apr 11 10 AM–2 PM

online.note: Register via Massachusetts Online Voter Registration.

inPerson.location: Needham Town Hall, Town Clerk's Office, 1471 Highland Avenue
inPerson.note: In-person deadline at Town Clerk's office.

sameDayRegistration.note: Massachusetts allows same-day voter registration at your polling place on Election Day.

officesOnBallot.note: Select Board functions as town executive leadership, similar to a city mayor/council structure.
Controls school policy and budgeting — typically among the most closely watched local races.

localElectionCycle.note: Sharon uses a Town Meeting government. Residents also elect Town Meeting Members by precinct. The Select Board expanded from 3 to 5 members in 2025.

locations.name: Sharon Town Hall — Town Clerk's Office
locations.hours: Mon–Fri 8:30 AM–4:30 PM; Sat May 16 10 AM–2 PM

online.note: Register via Massachusetts Online Voter Registration by April 24.

inPerson.location: Sharon Town Hall, Town Clerk's Office, 90 South Main Street
inPerson.note: Town Clerk's Office open until 5:00 PM on April 24 for voter registration only.

sameDayRegistration.note: Massachusetts allows same-day voter registration at your polling place on Election Day.

officesOnBallot.note: Select Board is Sharon's chief executive body.

candidates.name: Alexander Schneiderman
candidates.note: Serving via appointment; seeking first elected term.

officesOnBallot.note: Town Meeting Members vote on zoning, budget, development, and local bylaws. Elected by precinct — check townofsharon.net for your precinct's candidates.

townMeeting.note: Annual Town Meeting precedes the Annual Town Election. Same voter registration deadline of April 24 applies.

elections.notes: Registration deadline per Town of Sharon official announcement, April 22, 2026. Annual Town Meeting: May 4, 2026. Annual Town Election: May 19, 2026.
